---
title: "Reference"
page-layout: full
---

::: {.hero}
::: {.container}
# Curated Documentation Hub

Use this page to route into workflows and concepts. Function-level details remain in pkgdown.

[Function reference by job](reference-by-action.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
[Function reference](pkgdown/reference/index.html){.btn .btn-outline-light}
:::
:::

::: {.section}
::: {.container}

## Start and workflow routing

- [Start hub](start/index.qmd)
- [Start roadmap](start/roadmap.qmd)
- [Start here](start/start-here.qmd)
- [Basic compile and run](start/basic-model-compile-run.qmd)
- [Backends and workflow](start/backends-and-workflow.qmd)
- [Troubleshooting](start/troubleshooting.qmd)

## Topic hubs

- [Kernels hub](kernels.qmd)
- [Advanced hub](advanced/index.qmd)
- [Examples hub](examples/index.qmd)

## pkgdown authoritative docs

- [Function reference by job](reference-by-action.qmd)
- [Function reference](pkgdown/reference/index.html)

:::
:::

<!-- cmgpd-footer:start -->
## Prereqs
- Required packages and data for this page are listed in the setup chunks above.

## Outputs
- This page renders model fits, diagnostics, and summary artifacts generated by package APIs.

## Interpretation
- Canonical concept page: [Spec And Contracts](developers/spec-and-contracts.qmd)
- Treat this page as an application/example view and use the canonical page for core definitions.

## Next
- Continue to the linked canonical concept page, then return for implementation-specific details.
<!-- cmgpd-footer:end -->
